tools.description: Search Ancient Greek forms using the Proteus phonology engine.

McpSearchInput.description: Validated input for the Ancient Phonology MCP search tool.

dialect_hint.description: Dialect hint for IPA conversion. ``None`` (the MCP default) means 'defer to the language profile default', which keeps the tool schema language-agnostic; the REST API uses 'attic' as its default because Ancient Greek is currently the only profile.
dialect_hint.title: Dialect Hint

max_candidates.description: Maximum number of candidates to return.
max_candidates.title: Max Candidates

source_language.description: Language profile used for phonological search.
source_language.title: Source Language

McpSearchInput.title: McpSearchInput

tools.name: ancient_phonology.search

DataVersions.description: Version metadata for data sources used in search.

lexicon_updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of lexicon last update.
lexicon_updated_at.title: Lexicon Updated At

rules.description: Aggregated phonological rules version (max of all rule files).
rules.title: Rules

DataVersions.title: DataVersions

OrthographicNote.description: Candidate-level note about writing-system or spelling conventions.

confidence.description: Qualitative confidence assigned to the orthographic note.
confidence.title: Confidence

kind.description: Machine-readable category for the orthographic note.
kind.title: Kind

label.description: Short display label for the note.
label.title: Label

messages.description: Human-readable note messages for the candidate.
messages.title: Messages

normalized_form.description: Regularized or dictionary-facing form referenced by the note.
normalized_form.title: Normalized Form

period_label.description: Historical period or writing-system label for the note.
period_label.title: Period Label

pre_reform_romanization.description: Romanization of the pre-reform spelling, using macron-ō for the long /oː/ written as single Ο before the orthographic reform.
pre_reform_romanization.title: Pre Reform Romanization

pre_reform_spelling.description: Pre-403/2 BCE Attic inscriptional spelling paired with the normalized form, when applicable (e.g., παιδίο for παιδίου).
pre_reform_spelling.title: Pre Reform Spelling

references.description: Short source or documentation references supporting the note.
references.title: References

romanization.description: Romanized form referenced by the note.
romanization.title: Romanization

OrthographicNote.title: OrthographicNote

RequestEcho.description:
Sanitized request parameters echoed for reproducibility.

``query_form`` is the client-supplied query verbatim — it is independent of
the ``PROTEUS_LOG_RAW_SEARCH_QUERY`` server-log guard, which only redacts
raw queries from server logs. Operators that need the raw query stripped
from response bodies should redact at the fronting proxy. See
``README.md`` "Deployment & Operations".
RequestEcho.title: RequestEcho

ResponseMeta.description: Reproducibility and version metadata for public API responses.

data_versions.description: Version metadata for data sources used in the response.

request_echo.description: Sanitized validated request parameters, when applicable.

ruleset_versions.description: Aggregated ruleset version by language profile.
ruleset_versions.title: Ruleset Versions

verification_url.description: Deterministic URL that can reproduce the request.
verification_url.title: Verification Url

ResponseMeta.title: ResponseMeta

RuleStep.description: Single applied rule step in a search explanation.

from_phone.description: Source IPA phone before the rule applied.
from_phone.title: From Phone

position.description: Zero-based phone position in the alignment, or -1 when unknown.
position.title: Position

rule_id.description: Stable identifier for the phonological rule.
rule_id.title: Rule Id

rule_name.description: Human-readable display name for the rule.
rule_name.title: Rule Name

rule_name_en.description: English display name for the rule.
rule_name_en.title: Rule Name En

to_phone.description: Target IPA phone after the rule applied.
to_phone.title: To Phone

RuleStep.title: RuleStep

SearchHit.description: A matched headword returned from phonological search.

alignment_summary.description: Short one-line summary of the main phonological differences.
alignment_summary.title: Alignment Summary

applied_rule_count.description: Count of explicit catalogued rules applied to explain the match.
applied_rule_count.title: Applied Rule Count

candidate_bucket.description: Default presentation bucket for the result list.
candidate_bucket.title: Candidate Bucket

confidence.description: Normalized confidence score (0.0-1.0, higher is more similar). Inverse of ``distance``: ``confidence = 1.0 - distance``. Both fields are provided to support different consumer preferences. Exact and rule-supported short-query matches may be retained even when this score is below the short-query confidence floor; partial-form ranking applies separate wildcard-coverage semantics.
confidence.title: Confidence

distance.description: Normalized phonological distance from the query in the 0.0-1.0 range (0.0 = identical, lower is more similar).
distance.title: Distance

explanation.description: Human-readable prose summary of the derivation.
explanation.title: Explanation

headword.description: Matched lexicon entry in Greek script.
headword.title: Headword

ipa.description: IPA transcription of the matched headword.
ipa.title: Ipa

match_type.description: High-level classification describing how the candidate matched.
match_type.title: Match Type

observed_change_count.description: Count of uncatalogued observed changes retained in the explanation.
observed_change_count.title: Observed Change Count

orthographic_notes.description: Candidate-level notes about orthographic correspondences, historical spelling systems, or beginner-facing reading aids.
orthographic_notes.title: Orthographic Notes

rule_support.description: Whether at least one explicit catalogued rule supports the candidate.
rule_support.title: Rule Support

rules_applied.description: Ordered rule steps explaining the match.
rules_applied.title: Rules Applied

uncertainty.description: Qualitative uncertainty label for the ranked candidate.
uncertainty.title: Uncertainty

why_candidate.description: Short bullet points explaining why the candidate ranked highly.
why_candidate.title: Why Candidate

SearchHit.title: SearchHit

outputSchema.description: Structured MCP response for Ancient Phonology search.

query_ipa.description: IPA transcription computed for the query.
query_ipa.title: Query Ipa

query_mode.description: Input classification used by the search engine.
query_mode.title: Query Mode

truncated.description: True when candidate annotation was truncated.
truncated.title: Truncated

outputSchema.title: McpSearchOutput
